name: Fresh Strawberry Mousse
recipeIngredient: 1/3 Cup Whipping cream, whipped - soft peaks
recipeInstructions:
1. Oil a 3-cup mold or two 1-cup souffle dishes fitted with foil collars.
2. In the cup for the gelatin, sprinkle the gelatin over the orange juice and let it stand until the liquid is absorbed, about 5 minutes.
3. Meanwhile, in a medium bowl of electric mixer, beat the egg, yolk, and sugar at high speed until the mixture forms a ribbon when the beaters are lifted, about 5 to 7 minutes. Set aside.
4. In a processor or blender, puree the strawberries and Framboise until smooth. Place the gelatin cup in a small pan of hot water and heat over low heat until the gelatin is completely dissolved and clear. Stir into the egg mixture.
5. Blend in the pureed strawberries. Pour the bowl (if using) into the larger mold, if prepared, and chill gently with rubber spatula until almost set, about 10 minutes.
6. Fold in the whipped cream. Refrigerate until set.
7. If using a mold, invert onto a platter before serving. Garnish with sliced strawberries and pistachios.
